name: Stargaze Entertainment Group Inc.
summary: Stargaze Entertainment Group Inc. operates as an entertainment production and distribution company. It focuses on the creation and distribution of films, music, and television shows. The company was formerly known as Umining Resources Inc. and changed its name to Stargaze Entertainment Group Inc. in March 2015 to reflect the change of corporate direction. Stargaze Entertainment Group Inc. was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Plattsburgh, New York.
